characters.heading: Sino-Vietnamese Vocabulary
characters.normal:
| Word | Characters | Meaning | Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| sГЎch | еҶҠ | book | `ДҗГўy lГ  sГЎch.` |
| bГәt | зӯҶ | pen | `ДҗГўy lГ  bГәt.` |
| bГ n | зӣӨ | desk; table | `ДҗГўy lГ  bГ n.` |

These familiar school words have long-standing character links. Keep using their Vietnamese spellings in ordinary reading and writing.
characters.expert:
| Word | Characters | Meaning | Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| sГЎch | еҶҠ | book | `ДҗГўy lГ  sГЎch.` |
| bГәt | зӯҶ | pen | `ДҗГўy lГ  bГәt.` |
| bГ n | зӣӨ | desk; table | `ДҗГўy lГ  bГ n.` |

Expert context: **sГЎch**, **bГәt**, and **bГ n** preserve established Sino-Vietnamese readings associated with еҶҠ, зӯҶ, and зӣӨ. The furniture sense of **bГ n** reflects semantic development from the earlier board or tray sense of зӣӨ; all three rows record lexical history rather than current Vietnamese writing practice.

provenance.locator: Minh Anh: ДҗГўy lГ  bГ n.
